description: CompositionBlack sandals made of lightweight, form fitting, odour resistant EVAWash care1. Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washEnjoy summer with these simple low slung pair of sandals in ballerina design. The croslite footbed provides ergonomic Fit and comfort and the sandals give superior shock absorption. The ankle strap ensures a snug fit, while the white rhinestone adds a bit of sparkle to the footwear. The leaf pattern on the outsole enhances grip, making it perfect for a day at the beach or for urban wear.
